defect: Schrader cores left in during evacuation (SEQ)
prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.
scenario: You are on a field-service visit to an installed, operating asset, working from symptoms, the work order, and OEM service information. The work under review is Brazing & evacuation, part of the HVAC-R scope. The observed field condition is: Schrader cores left in during evacuation (SEQ). The work is in service as an operating asset. Reference material on hand: mfr specs, ACCA, EPA 608.
title: Fault diagnosis: Brazing & evacuation (service call)
